name: enterprise-ai-product-manager-catalyst
description: A modular PM skills marketplace for enterprise B2B product managers. 37 skills, 13 commands, 6 workflows across 8 plugins — covering the full product lifecycle from discovery through growth, with a dedicated agentic AI plugin for designing, evaluating, and governing AI-powered products.
author: Saquib Jawed

plugins.name: pm-discovery
plugins.description: Customer interviews, competitive analysis, research synthesis, market sizing, and advisory board management.

plugins.name: pm-definition
plugins.description: PRD development, API spec design, prioritization frameworks, roadmap planning, and compliance review.

plugins.name: pm-delivery
plugins.description: Sprint planning, acceptance criteria, analytics instrumentation, and tech debt negotiation.

plugins.name: pm-launch
plugins.description: GTM planning, sales enablement, release notes, RFP response, and customer migration.

plugins.name: pm-growth
plugins.description: Metrics analysis, experimentation, pricing and packaging, and expansion strategy.

plugins.name: pm-operations
plugins.description: Stakeholder communications, decision records, vendor evaluation, platform strategy, and incident response.

plugins.name: pm-leadership
plugins.description: Vision and strategy, OKR management, executive presentations, and team coaching.

plugins.name: pm-agentic-ai
plugins.description: Agentic architecture design, AI evaluation frameworks, guardrails and governance, human-in-the-loop patterns, and AI-native UX — the skills no other PM marketplace offers.
